title: Sweet Tanduqueria Chicken Tempura
description: A unique Indian-inspired dish featuring crispy tempura chicken tossed in a sweet and tangy tanduqueria sauce.
instructions: In a shallow dish, mix together flour, eggs, and tempura.
Heat 1/2 cup of vegetable oil in a deep frying pan over medium-high heat.
Dredge chicken pieces in the flour mixture, shaking off excess.
Dip floured chicken in the egg wash, then coat in tempura mixture.
Fry coated chicken in hot oil until golden brown and cooked through.
Remove fried chicken from oil and place on paper towels to drain excess oil.
In a separate pan, heat the sweet tanduqueria sauce over medium heat.
Add the fried chicken to the sauce and toss to coat.
